description: You are a Release Engineer at a SaaS company executing a 'Blue-Green' deployment strategy, shifting processing workloads from an older instance class (the 'Blue' fleet: instances 1 & 2) to a new graviton-based instance (the 'Green' fleet: instance 3). Create and save a Graphite dashboard named exactly 'Blue-Green Migration' featuring four graphs. The graph titled 'Blue Fleet Aggregate Load' must use sumSeries() to combine servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization and servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization with the alias 'Blue Total'. The graph titled 'Green Fleet Load' must target servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.cloudwatch_utilization with the alias 'Green Total'. The graph titled 'Migration Shift Percentage' must use asPercent() to calculate the Green fleet's CPU utilization as a percentage of the entire fleet's total CPU utilization. The graph titled 'Migration Differential' must use diffSeries() to subtract the Green fleet's CPU utilization from the Blue fleet's aggregate CPU utilization. All dashboard and graph titles must match the specified names exactly.
